svg.title: Risk Scoring Engine Architecture
svg.desc: Three-channel risk scoring engine: drought, pest, and nutrient channels feed into composite score with 7-day projection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Open-Meteo return for weather data?')
sendPrompt('What NDVI data does the scoring engine use?')
sendPrompt('What is cropKnowledge.json and what does it contain?')
sendPrompt('Explain the drought score formula in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the pest pressure score formula in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the nutrient deficiency score formula in detail')
sendPrompt('How is the composite score calculated and what do the weights come from?')
g.text: weights from cropKnowledge per crop × stage

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the 7-day forecast projection work in the scoring engine?')
g.text: re-run scorer per forecast day → ForecastDay[]
